name: Abigail Thanriaguiaxus
description:
Abigail "Brand" Thanriaguiaxus is a half-alien half-human mutant agent of S.W.O.R.D., and frequent begrudging ally of Earth's X-Men. Abigail was born and raised on the planet Axus to an extraterrestrial father and a woman from Earth, from whom she inherited the X-Gene.

Age: 32

Hair: Green

Eyes: Green
creator: Darkest.Redbird
